mapper.select: SELECT A.SURVEY_ID , A.SURVEY_NAME , A.REG_DT , COUNT(B.SURVEY_ID) AS TOTAL_PARTICIPANTS , R.STATUS_CODE , R.RESPONSE_ID FROM TBL_SURVEY A JOIN TBL_USER_SURVEY_RESPONSE B ON A.SURVEY_ID = B.SURVEY_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SURVEY_ID, STATUS_CODE, RESPONSE_ID FROM ( SELECT SURVEY_ID , STATUS_CODE , RESPONSE_ID , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SURVEY_ID ORDER BY REG_DT DESC) AS RN FROM TBL_USER_SURVEY_RESPONSE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ) RANKED WHERE RN = 1 ) R ON A.SURVEY_ID = R.SURVEY_ID GROUP BY A.SURVEY_ID, A.SURVEY_NAME, A.REG_DT, R.STATUS_CODE, R.RESPONSE_ID ORDER BY MAX(B.REG_DT) DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.SURVEY_ID) FROM TBL_SURVEY A JOIN TBL_USER_SURVEY_RESPONSE B ON A.SURVEY_ID = B.SURVEY_ID WHERE 1=1
AND A.SURVEY_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
